_comment: Per-console startCart (rank 32): each EMPTY cabinet's SELECTED cart type (0..CartTypeCount-1 at consumption; an out-of-range value here is range-clamped away rather than refused, since Puck.Scene cannot see the overworld's cart-type count) overrides the overworld's own default staggering, so console 0 offers BRICKFALL (cart type 5) and console 1 offers SOLITAIRE (cart type 7) the moment the run boots, instead of the built-in world-lens/camera/showcase stagger. `Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld-start-cart.json`, then Interact (North) at either cabinet to insert its overridden cart.
